1 ?0 + ?6 = ?06

Matching
1 ?06 0010011110 5
2 ?17 1111010010 6

Constant
1 C 1 1111111111 a mismatch
1 C 1n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
1 I 0 0010010101 4 mismatch
1 I 0n 1101101010 6 mismatch

Unary 6
1 I 6 0000001011 3 mismatch
1 I 6n 1111110100 7 mismatch

Binary 06
1 AND 06 0000000001 1 mismatch
1 AND 06n 1111111110 9 mismatch
1 OR 06 0010011111 6 mismatch
1 OR 06n 1101100000 4 mismatch
1 XOR 06 0010011110 5 match 1/2
2 XOR 17 1111010010 6 match 2/2
all match XOR 06 17
1 XOR 06n 1101100001 5 mismatch
1 AND-NOT 06 0010010100 3 mismatch
1 AND-NOT 06n 1101101011 7 mismatch

1 0010011110 5

Starting at I 5 increasing
I 6 0000001011 partial 1101101010 6

left 9
Starting at I 2 decreasing
I 1 0111101110 partial 0111000011 5

Choosing right
1 I 0
2 I 1

Selected
0 I 5
1 XOR 06
2 XOR 17
3 I 2
4 I 3
5 I 4
6 I 5
7 I 6

Applying to 01111001
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 5 = 0
1 XOR 06 = XOR(I 0,I 6) = XOR(0,0) = 0
2 XOR 17 = XOR(I 1,I 7) = XOR(1,1) = 0
3 I 2 = 1
4 I 3 = 1
5 I 4 = 1
6 I 5 = 0
7 I 6 = 0

\boxed{00011100}
